TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == swantin == ťÖłŤó§ . swantin u kaazihay a nipaluma i hekal, maydih tu cilal. mikalic i zuma a kilang, tayza katukuh ipabaw nu kilang. sibalu i 5-6 bulad. anu maazih ku sumanahay a balu i buyu', kay unu balu nu swantin. anu masuaw kisu, taneng kisu mitanam kya papah, cilemin. adidi' ku balu. muculil i zazan nu buyu'sa, anu maazih sumanahay a balu, izaw tu ku swantin ipabaw. anu masepi kisu, taneng kisu maazih kulemi tanaya' a heci. mapela' ku heci sa, mabahel tu ku sibanuhay a sapaluma, katukuh i lala'. u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika
S.PHON: == swantin == ** . swantin u kaazińßaj a nipar~…ĺuma i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, majdińß tu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ. mikar~…ĺi ¶ i zuma a kir~…ĺaŇč, tajza katukuńß ipabaw nu kir~…ĺaŇč. sibar~…ĺu i *-* bur~…ĺad. anu maazińß ku sumanańßaj a bar~…ĺu i buju Ē~ °, kaj unu bar~…ĺu nu swantin. anu masuaw kisu, tan…ôŇč kisu mitanam kja papańß, ¶ir~…ĺ…ômin. adidi Ē~ ° ku bar~…ĺu. mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ i zazan nu buju Ē~ °sa, anu maazińß sumanańßaj a bar~…ĺu, izaw tu ku swantin ipabaw. anu mas…ôpi kisu, tan…ôŇč kisu maazińß kur~…ĺ…ômi tanaja Ē~ ° a ńß…ô ¶i. map…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ ° ku ńß…ô ¶i sa, mabańß…ôr~…ĺ tu ku sibanuńßaj a sapar~…ĺuma, katukuńß i r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °. u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu-ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika
S.FORM: == swantin == ťÖłŤó§ . swantin u kaazihay a nipaluma i hekal, maydih tu cilal. mikalic i zuma a kilang, tayza katukuh ipabaw nu kilang. sibalu i 5-6 bulad. anu maazih ku sumanahay a balu i buyu', kay unu balu nu swantin. anu masuaw kisu, taneng kisu mitanam kya papah, cilemin. adidi' ku balu. muculil i zazan nu buyu'sa, anu maazih sumanahay a balu, izaw tu ku swantin ipabaw. anu masepi kisu, taneng kisu maazih kulemi tanaya' a heci. mapela' ku heci sa, mabahel tu ku sibanuhay a sapaluma, katukuh i lala'. u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika
S.PHON: == swantin == ** . swantin u kaazińßaj a nipar~…ĺuma i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, majdińß tu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ. mikar~…ĺi ¶ i zuma a kir~…ĺaŇč, tajza katukuńß ipabaw nu kir~…ĺaŇč. sibar~…ĺu i *-* bur~…ĺad. anu maazińß ku sumanańßaj a bar~…ĺu i buju Ē~ °, kaj unu bar~…ĺu nu swantin. anu masuaw kisu, tan…ôŇč kisu mitanam kja papańß, ¶ir~…ĺ…ômin. adidi Ē~ ° ku bar~…ĺu. mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ i zazan nu buju Ē~ °sa, anu maazińß sumanańßaj a bar~…ĺu, izaw tu ku swantin ipabaw. anu mas…ôpi kisu, tan…ôŇč kisu maazińß kur~…ĺ…ômi tanaja Ē~ ° a ńß…ô ¶i. map…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ ° ku ńß…ô ¶i sa, mabańß…ôr~…ĺ tu ku sibanuńßaj a sapar~…ĺuma, katukuńß i r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °. u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu-ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika
